mapper.sql: id, name, code, description, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, creator_id, updater_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM aim_agent_job_type WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM aim_agent_job_type WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aim_agent_job_type WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT MAX(sort_order) FROM aim_agent_job_type WHERE is_deleted = 0
